creator: bsam@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thanks for the new port and please consider running (devel/portlint):
$ portlint -aN
to find out some bugs. For the minimalist Makefile example look at:
http://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/porters-handbook/quick-porting.html#PORTING-MAKEFILE

WBR
-- 
bsam
